scheme_name: Grant of Subsidy for Procurement of Vehicle
implementing_department: Department of Fisheries and Fishermen Welfare, Government of Puducherry
description: Provides subsidy for procurement of vehicles to ensure quick transport of fish and reduce spoilage.
benefits: 50% subsidy up to ₹75,000 for auto goods carrier (≤1 ton)
50% subsidy up to ₹1,50,000 for mini truck (1–3 ton)
50% subsidy up to ₹3,50,000 for mini lorry (3–5 ton)
50% subsidy up to ₹5,00,000 for insulated fish van (5–10 ton)
50% subsidy up to ₹15,000 for moped with insulated ice box
50% subsidy up to ₹2,000 per annum for engine spares
eligibility: No prior subsidy for same purpose

steps: Collect application form from Fisheries Department
